scripts.build:all: pnpm check:install && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/contracts build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/card-markdown build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/domain build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/api build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/cli build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/web build && node scripts/compose-stack.mjs prod build
scripts.start: pnpm check:install && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/contracts build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/cli build && node scripts/compose-stack.mjs prod up -d --build
scripts.start:dev: pnpm check:install && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/contracts build && pnpm --filter @agent-kanban/cli build && node scripts/compose-stack.mjs dev up -d --build
